name: getFlagHintsVisible
description: Returns whether satellite position hints are displayed.
returnDescription: true if satellite hints are visible

name: setFlagHintsVisible
description: Shows or hides satellite position hints.
example: Satellites.setFlagHintsVisible(true);

name: flagHintsVisible
description: Property that controls whether satellite hints are displayed.
example:
var visible = core.getStelProperty('Satellites.flagHintsVisible');
core.setStelProperty('Satellites.flagHintsVisible', true);

name: getFlagLabelsVisible
description: Returns whether text labels are displayed next to satellite hints.
returnDescription: true if satellite labels are visible, false if hidden

name: setFlagLabelsVisible
description: Shows or hides text labels next to satellite hints.

parameters.name: visible
parameters.description: true to show labels, false to hide

name: flagLabelsVisible
description: Property that controls whether satellite labels are displayed.
returnDescription: true if labels are visible, false if hidden
example: core.setStelProperty('Satellites.flagLabelsVisible', true);

name: getLabelFontSize
description: Returns the font size used for satellite labels in pixels.
example:
var fontSize = Satellites.getLabelFontSize();
core.debug("Label font size: " + fontSize + "px");

name: setLabelFontSize
description: Sets the font size for satellite labels in pixels.

name: labelFontSize
description: Property that controls the font size of satellite labels in pixels.
example: core.setStelProperty('Satellites.labelFontSize', 12);

name: getFlagOrbitLines
description: Returns whether satellite orbit lines are drawn on the sky.
returnDescription: true if orbit lines are visible, false if hidden

name: setFlagOrbitLines
description: Shows or hides satellite orbit lines on the sky.

parameters.name: visible
parameters.description: true to show orbit lines, false to hide

name: flagOrbitLines
description: Property that controls whether satellite orbit lines are displayed.
returnDescription: true if orbit lines are visible
example: core.setStelProperty('Satellites.flagOrbitLines', true);

name: getFlagIconicMode
description: Returns whether iconic mode is enabled (simplified satellite icons instead of realistic representations).
returnDescription: true if iconic mode is enabled, false if using standard icons

name: setFlagIconicMode
description: Enables or disables iconic mode (simplified satellite icons).

parameters.name: enabled
parameters.description: true to enable iconic mode, false for standard icons

name: flagIconicMode
description: Property that controls whether iconic mode is enabled.
returnDescription: true if iconic mode is enabled
example: core.setStelProperty('Satellites.flagIconicMode', true);

name: getFlagHideInvisible
description: Returns whether satellites that are not currently visible (below horizon or in Earth's shadow) are hidden.
returnDescription: true if invisible satellites are hidden, false if shown

name: setFlagHideInvisible
description: Sets whether satellites that are not currently visible should be hidden.

parameters.name: hide
parameters.description: true to hide invisible satellites, false to show them

name: flagHideInvisible
description: Property that controls whether invisible satellites are hidden.
returnDescription: true if invisible satellites are hidden
example: core.setStelProperty('Satellites.flagHideInvisible', true);

name: getFlagColoredInvisible
description: Returns whether invisible satellites are drawn with a special color (darker) instead of being hidden.
returnDescription: true if invisible satellites are colored, false if hidden or normal

name: setFlagColoredInvisible
description: Sets whether invisible satellites should be drawn with a special color.

parameters.name: colored
parameters.description: true to color invisible satellites, false to use normal color

name: flagColoredInvisible
description: Property that controls whether invisible satellites have a special color.
returnDescription: true if invisible satellites are colored differently
example: core.setStelProperty('Satellites.flagColoredInvisible', true);

name: getInvisibleSatelliteColor
description: Returns the color used for invisible satellites (when colored mode is enabled). Default is dark gray (0.2, 0.2, 0.2).
returnDescription: RGB color vector with values from 0.0 to 1.0
example:
var color = Satellites.getInvisibleSatelliteColor();
core.debug("Invisible satellite color: RGB(" + color[0] + ", " + color[1] + ", " + color[2] + ")");

name: setInvisibleSatelliteColor
description: Sets the color used for invisible satellites.

parameters.name: color
parameters.description: RGB color vector created via core.vec3f(r, g, b)

example:
var darkRed = core.vec3f(0.3, 0.05, 0.05);
Satellites.setInvisibleSatelliteColor(darkRed);

name: invisibleSatelliteColor
description: ⚠️ Property that returns the color for invisible satellites as a string. For reading, use core.getStelProperty(). For writing, use Satellites.setInvisibleSatelliteColor().

name: getTransitSatelliteColor
description: Returns the color used for satellites in transit through the Sun or the Moon (color of markers). Default is black (0.0, 0.0, 0.0).
returnDescription: RGB color vector with values from 0.0 to 1.0
example:
var color = Satellites.getTransitSatelliteColor();
core.debug("Transit satellite color: RGB(" + color[0] + ", " + color[1] + ", " + color[2] + ")");

name: setTransitSatelliteColor
description: Sets the color used for satellites in transit through the Sun or the Moon.
example:
var brightRed = core.vec3f(1.0, 0.2, 0.2);
Satellites.setTransitSatelliteColor(brightRed);

name: transitSatelliteColor
description: ⚠️ Property that returns the color for transit satellites as a string. For reading, use core.getStelProperty(). For writing, use Satellites.setTransitSatelliteColor().
example:
var colorStr = core.getStelProperty('Satellites.transitSatelliteColor');
var parts = colorStr.split(',');

name: getUpdatesEnabled
description: Returns whether automatic TLE (Two-Line Element) updates from the internet are enabled.
returnDescription: true if automatic updates are enabled, false if disabled

name: setUpdatesEnabled
description: Enables or disables automatic TLE (Two-Line Element) updates from the internet.

parameters.name: enabled
parameters.description: true to enable automatic updates, false to disable

name: updatesEnabled
description: Property that controls whether automatic TLE updates are enabled.
returnDescription: true if automatic updates are enabled
example: core.setStelProperty('Satellites.updatesEnabled', true);

name: getUpdateFrequencyHours
description: Returns the frequency of automatic TLE updates in hours. Default is 72 hours (3 days).
example:
var freq = Satellites.getUpdateFrequencyHours();
core.debug("Update frequency: " + freq + " hours");

name: setUpdateFrequencyHours
description: Sets the frequency of automatic TLE updates in hours.

name: updateFrequencyHours
description: Property that controls the automatic update frequency in hours.
example: core.setStelProperty('Satellites.updateFrequencyHours', 48);

name: updateFromOnlineSources
description: Manually triggers an immediate update of satellite TLE data from configured online sources (Celestrak, AMSAT, etc.).

name: saveCatalog
description: Saves the current satellite catalog (including custom visibility settings) to a JSON file.

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: File path to save the catalog. If empty, saves to default location.

name: getById
description: Returns a satellite object by its NORAD catalog number.
returnDescription: Satellite object, or null if not found

name: getSatellites
description: Returns a hash of satellites filtered by group and visibility status. Status values: 0=Visible, 1=NotVisible, 2=Both, 3=NewlyAdded, 4=OrbitError.
returnDescription: Hash mapping satellite ID to satellite name

name: getGroups
description: Returns the set of all satellite group names available in the current catalog (e.g., 'visual', 'starlink', 'iss', 'gps', 'communications').

name: getGroupIdList
description: Returns a sorted list of all satellite group names available in the current catalog.
example:
var groupList = Satellites.getGroupIdList();
core.debug("Groups: " + groupList.join(", "));

name: listAllIds
description: Returns a list of all NORAD catalog numbers for satellites in the current catalog.

name: listAllObjects
description: Returns a list of all satellite objects with their names. This can be used for auto-completion and search.

parameters.name: inEnglish
parameters.description: true to list English names, false for translated names

name: searchByName
description: Searches for a satellite by its English name, NORAD number, or international designator.
returnDescription: Satellite object, or null if not found

name: searchByNameI18n
description: Searches for a satellite by its translated (localized) name.
returnDescription: Satellite object, or null if not found

name: searchByID
description: Searches for a satellite by its unique identifier (NORAD catalog number).
returnDescription: Satellite object, or null if not found

name: getLastSelectedSatelliteID
description: Returns the NORAD ID of the last selected satellite in the GUI.
returnDescription: NORAD catalog number of the last selected satellite
